CustomField.description: When checked, ALL validation rules in this group are completely skipped during trigger execution. This is a group-level kill switch that overrides individual rule settings. Applies unconditionally to all users.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to disable ALL validation rules in this group for all users. Use as a kill switch during troubleshooting or data migrations. Uncheck to re-enable.
CustomField.label: Bypass Execution
